title: Chapter 44
text: COMING SOON Are you itching for more from this amazing friend’s group? The second book in the series will feature our sweet Marc, and wild child Avery. Marc needs a fake fiancé to help him lock in the deal of a lifetime. Avery wants nothing to do with a relationship, she’s only here for a good time. Coming August, 2023 is a spicy, fake dating, opposites attract romance— That First Date , which is now available for preorder .
